## Server

Which MCP server does this relate to? (git-tools, github-tools, dotnet-tools, ollama-tools, rust-tools, or new server)

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the tool or enhancement you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.
